question: Determine the total amount of quantifiable dividend capacity.

stage1_classifications.rationale: Builder basket directly contributes to total dividend capacity.
action_scope=reallocable with cap_usd; contributes to aggregate dividend capacity.
Ratio RP basket permits unlimited dividends on condition; quantifiable capacity component.
Cap_usd set; additive dividend-related basket contributes to total.
Tax distribution basket; no quantifiable cap, restricted purpose.
Overhead basket; no quantifiable cap, restricted purpose.
Equity award basket; no cap, restricted purpose, conditional.
No quantifiable cap; categorical basket for unrestricted sub distributions.
action_scope=reallocable with cap_usd; unused capacity flows to dividends.

Builder RDP basket; action_scope=general but no cap_usd set.
Refinancing RDP; specific, no cap, not reallocable to dividends.
Equity-funded RDP; specific, no cap, not reallocable to dividends.
IP designation prohibition; unrelated to dividend capacity.
Aggregate sub-source feeding builder basket; supplementary context.

EBITDA_FC sub-source feeding builder basket; supplementary detail.

stage2_citations.quote: unlimited additional Dividends; provided that on a Pro Forma Basis, the First Lien Leverage Ratio...shall be no greater than the greater of (x) 5.75 to 1.00 and (y) the First Lien Leverage Ratio...for the most recently ended Test Period
additional Dividends may be made...in an aggregate amount not to exceed the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA for the most recently ended Test Period
"Cumulative Amount" shall mean, on any date of determination (the "Reference Date"), the sum of (without duplication):
"Cumulative Amount" shall mean, on any date of determination (the "Reference Date"), the sum of (without duplication):
payments to Holdings...to permit Holdings...to repurchase or redeem Qualified Capital Stock...held by current or former officers, directors, consultants or employees
for any taxable period for which Holdings, the Borrowers or any of their respective Subsidiaries are members of a consolidated, combined or similar income tax group

distributions for (i) general corporate, administrative, compliance and other overhead and related costs, fees and expenses...of Holdings or any direct or indirect parent of Holdings, and (ii) Public Company Costs
repurchases of Equity Interests deemed to occur upon the exercise of stock options if the Equity Interests represent a portion of the exercise price or withholding tax thereof

the distribution, by dividend or otherwise, of shares of Equity Interests of, or Indebtedness owed to Holdings or a Restricted Subsidiary by, or any assets of, an Unrestricted Subsidiary or the proceeds thereof

stage2_answer: The quantifiable dividend capacity consists of the following distinct pools: (1) **Unlimited conditional** — Section 6.06(o) [p.198]: unlimited dividends if, pro forma, First Lien Leverage Ratio ≤ 5.75x or the no-worse test is satisfied (no fixed dollar amount). (2) **General purpose — General RP Basket** — Section 6.06(j) [p.196]: the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA for the most recently ended Test Period (fixed floor: $130M; grower: 100% LTM EBITDA). (3) **General purpose — Builder Basket (Cumulative Amount)** — Definition of Cumulative Amount [p.32]: a separate pool starting at the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA, then growing by (among other things) 50% of cumulative Consolidated Net Income, available retained ECF, 100% of equity proceeds, retained asset sale proceeds, and investment returns — shared with RDP and investment baskets, reducing as used. (4) **Restricted purpose — Management Equity Basket** — Section 6.06(b) [p.195]: the greater of $20,000,000 per annum and 15% of Consolidated EBITDA (carryforward permitted), limited to equity repurchases from current/former officers, directors, consultants, or employees. (5) **Categorical (no fixed dollar cap)** — tax distributions (Section 6.06(c) [p.196], standalone taxpayer limit), holdco overhead/Public Company Costs (Section 6.06(k) [p.197]), cashless equity award repurchases (Section 6.06(d) [p.196]), and distributions of unrestricted subsidiary equity/assets/indebtedness (Section 6.06(p) [p.198]). The aggregate fixed-floor quantifiable capacity is at minimum $130M (general RP basket) + $130M (builder basket starter) + $20M/year (management equity basket) = **$280M in fixed-floor capacity**, with each basket's grower component (100% LTM EBITDA for the first two, 15% LTM EBITDA for the third) potentially yielding higher capacity depending on current EBITDA.
stage2_reasoning_conclusion: Quantifiable fixed-floor dividend capacity totals at minimum $130M from the general RP basket (Section 6.06(j)) plus a separate $130M floor from the builder basket starter (Section Definition of Cumulative Amount), plus $20M/year from the management equity basket (Section 6.06(b)); additional capacity under the ratio basket is unlimited if First Lien Leverage Ratio ≤ 5.75x (or no-worse), while other baskets (tax, overhead, equity award, unsub distributions) are categorical with no fixed dollar caps.
stage2_reasoning_analysis:
Per Category G guidance, baskets must be classified by capacity_category and analyzed separately.

**1. Unlimited Conditional (ratio basket) — Section 6.06(o):**
Norm 6e76ed06_ratio_rp_basket_permission provides UNLIMITED dividend capacity, subject to pro forma First Lien Leverage Ratio ≤ 5.75x OR the no-worse test (pro forma ratio no worse than pre-transaction ratio). This is not a fixed dollar amount and is contingent on leverage. Not quantifiable as a fixed number.

**2. General Purpose — Fixed/Grower Baskets (summable):**

(a) Section 6.06(j) General RP Basket [6e76ed06_general_rp_basket_permission]: Greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA for the most recently ended Test Period. Fixed floor = $130M.

(b) Builder Basket / Cumulative Amount [6e76ed06_builder_usage_permission]: Computed from sources — starts at the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA, then adds 50% of cumulative Consolidated Net Income, the greatest of Available Retained ECF Amount, 50% CNI, or 140% of Consolidated EBITDA (forward-looking component), plus 100% of equity proceeds, retained asset sale proceeds, investment returns, and debt conversion amounts. The fixed floor starter amount is $130M, but the total basket is inherently variable. Note: the builder basket is reduced by RDP and investment usage (shares capacity with Sections 6.09(a)(A) and 6.03(x)).

Because both baskets are general_purpose and fungible/additive, they each independently provide capacity (not summed together — they are separate baskets). The general RP basket floor is $130M; the builder basket floor is also $130M (starter), but these are separate pools.

**3. Restricted Purpose — Fixed Cap Baskets:**

(a) Management Equity Basket [6e76ed06_management_equity_basket_permission] — Section 6.06(b): Greater of $20,000,000 per annum and 15% of Consolidated EBITDA. Fixed floor = $20M/year, with carryforward permitted. Restricted to equity repurchases from officers/directors/employees.

(b) Tax Distribution Basket [6e76ed06_tax_distribution_basket_permission] — Section 6.06(c): Categorical/variable (standalone taxpayer limit), no fixed dollar cap extractable from data.

(c) Holdco Overhead Basket [6e76ed06_holdco_overhead_basket_permission] — Section 6.06(k): Categorical, no fixed dollar cap in extracted data.

(d) Equity Award Basket [6e76ed06_equity_award_permission] — Section 6.06(d): Unlimited on condition (cashless exercise/tax withholding only), no fixed dollar cap.

**4. Categorical (no fixed dollar cap):**

Unrestricted Sub Distribution Basket [6e76ed06_unrestricted_sub_equity_distribution_permission] — Section 6.06(p): Categorical carve-out for distributions of unsub equity/assets/indebtedness; no dollar cap.
